activities.title: Customer Discovery Studio — Squad Mission
materials: Squad mission brief (Cassiopeia, Pegasus, or Argo Navis)
instructions: Open Venture Blueprint → Customer Discovery and acknowledge your squad mission.
Review the interview guide and prepare 3–5 customer conversations.
Encode interviews — credit for completion, not length of notes.
Submit at least one thinking-shift reflection: What changed your thinking today?
Sync portfolio artifacts as missions complete.
outputs: Squad MIS progress and venture status metrics
debriefQuestions: What assumption did your squad challenge today?
Which interview surprised your team most?
What evidence do you still need before Stage Gate II?
